initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT races.name
FROM circuits
JOIN races ON circuits.circuitId = races.circuitId
JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId
WHERE circuits.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
AND results.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY results.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT races.name

JOIN results ON races.raceId = results.raceId

ORDER BY results.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1
